achievements.title: An Agent's Work is Never Done

achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 1 - A Wrench in the Works
achievements.description: Help the Construction Worker find his wrench.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 2 - Sweet Friend of Mines
achievements.description: Encourage the penguin to ride the extreme track with your expert Cart Surfing skills!
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 3 - Lost and Confused
achievements.description: Rescue the lost tour guide and bring him back to his friends.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 4 - Leaning Order of Pizza
achievements.description: Help the pizza chef deliver four pizzas.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 5 - The Wrong Orders
achievements.description: Drat! Help the pizza chef deliver four pizzas to the correct penguins!
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 6 - Drifting Away
achievements.description: Help the dark green penguin recover his missing sailboats.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 7 - Alien Conspiracy
achievements.description: Decode the strange and mysterious secret messages appearing across the island.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 8- Cause and Effect
achievements.description: Return missing items of clothing to penguin owners.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 9 - Penguins at Work
achievements.description: Help the construction worker repair things across the island.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Side Mission 10 - Hide and Seek
achievements.description: Track down all the missing puffles and return them to the Pet Shop.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Danceless Challenge
achievements.description: Complete a full game of the Dancing Challenge Mini-Game without missing a move.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Snowboarding Geek
achievements.description: Land 50 rounds of successful tricks in the Snowboarding Mini-Game. (One-session).
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Selective Fisherman
achievements.description: Catch 30 fluffies in a game of Ice Fishing without losing a life or catching a squid. (Play From Main Menu, Minigames).
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Flying Completionist
achievements.description: Collect all 150 coins in a game of Jetpack Adventure.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Addictive Driving
achievements.description: Score at least 2,000 points in a game of Cart Surfing without losing a life.
achievements.author: pinguupinguu

achievements.title: Plowing Through
achievements.description: Complete a game of Snow Trekker without bumping into obstacles. (Not during missions).
achievements.author: pinguupinguu
